GitHubPluginInstaller.TrustWarning: Installing a plugin from a GitHub repository runs arbitrary PHP code on this server with full Matomo privileges as soon as it is activated. Only add repositories you trust and review their release contents first.
GitHubPluginInstaller.TokenLabel: Personal Access Token (only needed for private repositories)
GitHubPluginInstaller.AssetPatternLabel: Asset name pattern (optional regex, e.g. to pick among multiple release files)
GitHubPluginInstaller.ConfirmRemove: Stop tracking this repository? Already installed plugin files are not removed.
GitHubPluginInstaller.InstallHint: Installing places plugin files under plugins/<Name> but does not activate them. Activate the new plugin from the standard Matomo plugin management page once you have reviewed it.
